description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for continuous integration tests of the decrypt oracle. The workflow should be callable and run on ubuntu-latest. It should have two jobs: one for tests and one for static analysis. The tests job should check out the repository, set up Python 3.9, install dependencies, and run tox with a local environment. The static analysis job should use a matrix strategy to run multiple static analysis tools (bandit, readme, flake8, pylint, flake8-tests, pylint-tests) with Python 3.9 and report results.
